title: VanillaMakotoMc
description: Vanilla assembly of mods for playing on the MakotoMC server
body:
**Welcome to a detailed description of this mod pack!**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Purpose of the mod pack:**
1) Optimization of the vanilla Minecraft client
2) Improvement and stabilization of all game processes
3) System optimization (reducing the load on the personal computer)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mod pack features
The mod pack contains the following mods:

PlasmoVoice - Adds voice chat to your game (This mod must be pre-installed on the server, if the mod is not on the server then no one will hear you)

EmoteCraft - A mod that adds dances and poses to Minecraft, and with the help of Blender and a special add-on you can create your own poses and dances (This mod must be pre-installed on the server, if the mod is not on the server, no one will see your emotion)

OnlineEmotes - Make this mod so that even if EmoteCraft is not installed on the server, other players will still see your pose and dance. This works on the basis of its own connection flow servers (All emotions will be visible only to those who have the same mod installed)
